old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.12","title":"Add internal Rust prefix route model","description":"Add canonical RouteTarget and bounded longest-prefix RoutingTable lookup in Rust while preserving all current host APIs and retaining non-/128 DAO wire rejection. DAO rebuild/expiry must preserve internal prefix routes under one MAX_ROUTES budget; returned paths remain egress paths.","acceptance_criteria":"Canonical /0,/64,/127,/128 keys and \u003e128 rejection; deterministic LPM and expired fallback; exact host mutation APIs; DAO rebuild preservation; mixed capacity atomicity; all non-/128 wire DAOs still reject without mutation; tests, clippy, and three reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:15:14.943462Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T21:15:35.86943Z","started_at":"2026-07-18T21:15:35.86943Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-18T21:20:35.86943Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-18T21:15:35.86943Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:15:15.072552Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Implemented safe internal Rust prefix model without wire enablement. RouteTarget canonicalizes /0,/64,/127,/128 and rejects \u003e128; RoutingTable uses bounded LPM with O(1) host-only fast path, explicit egress validation, exact host lifecycle APIs, combined MAX_ROUTES accounting, and DAO rebuild preservation. All wire DAO prefixes 0..127 still reject before replay/topology/route mutation. Validation: lichen-rpl 100 unit + 5 integration; lichen-node 157 unit plus doctests; strict scoped Clippy; lichen-rpl no-default check; rustfmt/diff checks; three final reviews no findings."}
Implemented and verified safe internal prefix route model
